repair_history.diagnosis:
Couldn't resolve reference to 'tempin1'.: AGREE annex is in system implementation scope but references component type features directly -> Move the AGREE annex to the system type 'voter' instead of 'temp_control'
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Invalid type comparison in AGREE expression due to unresolved references -> Remove the invalid equality assumptions referencing unresolved identifiers
named thing must be an expression with a type: AGREE expressions reference undefined symbols -> Remove all assumptions referencing undefined identifiers
Couldn't resolve reference to 'tempin2'.: AGREE annex is in system implementation scope but references component type features directly -> Move the AGREE annex to the system type 'voter' instead of 'temp_control'
Couldn't resolve reference to 'tempout'.: AGREE annex is in system implementation scope but references component type features directly -> Move the AGREE annex to the system type 'voter' instead of 'temp_control'

Couldn't resolve reference to 'temp1'.: temp1 is not a visible identifier in the component type scope -> Replace 'temp1' with 'tempin1' in the assume statement
Couldn't resolve reference to 'temp2'.: temp2 is not a visible identifier in the component type scope -> Replace 'temp2' with 'tempin2' in the assume statement
right side of binary expression 'or' is of type 'int' but must be of type 'bool': The expression 'tempin1 or tempin2' is invalid because tempin1 and tempin2 are of type 'temperature_type', not 'bool' -> Replace 'tempin1 or tempin2' with a valid boolean expression that relates the inputs to the output
